name: Cyprus - Hetalia
description:
Cyprus is a character in Hetalia, I know not a lot of people really know him but I do and he's been one of my favorite characters ever since. He's probably like, super niche as a character but I still love him a lot! I didn't see any bots of him so I thought I would make a bot of him!

You can crack him like I will, or you can have a friendly conversation with him... Apparently Cyprus likes to spread GOOD rumors in Greece and Turkiye... About Greece and Turkiye, because he wants to bring about peace to the two, he's so sweet. Cyprus I love you so much dude.

I'm using the name of the actual country because I don't know his human name, and I'm too lazy!!
creator: EnglandHetalia4Lyfe
